title: centaurea semiusta
intro: Centaurea semiusta, also known as Yellow Kniff or Mountain Centaury, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Centaurea semiusta include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
